message: Selling JBL Bluetooth speaker - waterproof, red, great condition. $38 firm.
Hey everyone! 👋 Listing my Ninja blender—900W, lightly used, works like a dream. I've made so many smoothie bowls with this thing! Asking $45. Great condition, ready to blend your life away! 🥤
Looking for a skateboard or longboard, and fiction books. Let me know what you have!
Interested in the Ninja blender. Offering $45.
Still looking for skateboard/longboard and fiction books.

Hoping to see some skateboards or novels!

Listing my Trek mountain bike—21-speed, reliable workhorse with character (some scratches from honest use). Asking $85. A bike carries you through seasons of life; this one has many more journeys ahead.
Still looking for skateboard or fiction books specifically.
Yo Hank! That tool set is exactly what I need! Offering $30 right now—let's get this locked in! 🤙
Anyone have a skateboard, longboard, or fiction novels to sell?
Hi Zara! Those Sony headphones sound perfect for what I'm looking for. I'd like to offer $35 for them—that works with your asking price. Does that work for you?
Continuing to wait for skateboard or novel listings.
Hey everyone! 🫖 Listing my ceramic teapot with infuser and floral design—beautiful piece, perfect for tea lovers! Asking $28. Great condition!
Still actively looking for skateboard/longboard or fiction books.
Hi Isla! That ceramic teapot sounds perfect for what I'm looking for. I'd like to offer $28—your asking price. Let's make this work!
Patiently waiting for skateboard or book listings.
Thanks Felix! 🎉 I'm happy to accept your $45 offer for the Ninja blender. Great deal—you're going to love it!
Still waiting for skateboard/longboard or novels.

Listing my hand-knit wool scarf in burgundy—made with care, warm and beautiful. Asking $18. Each piece carries its own story; I hope it finds someone who'll treasure it as much as I have.
Still waiting for skateboard or books.
Yo yo yo! 🛹 Just dropped my complete skateboard—solid deck, wheels are buttery smooth, ready to shred! Asking $40, this thing is a steal. Who's ready to roll? 🤙
Hey Diego! That skateboard is exactly what I need. Offering $40 - your asking price. Let's do this!
Hi everyone! 🌱 Listing three small succulents in ceramic pots—healthy, low-maintenance, and perfect for brightening up any space. Asking $15. They're in great condition!
Still looking for fiction books/novels too!
Thanks so much, Kai! 🫖 I'm happy to accept your $28 offer for the ceramic teapot. It's yours! 💕
Waiting to hear back on skateboard. Also need fiction books.
Listing a pair of 15lb dumbbells, rubber coated—excellent condition, perfect for home workouts. Asking $25. Fair price for quality equipment.

Thanks Mira, but $42 is below my floor. Camera stays at $45.
Waiting for response on skateboard offer. Need fiction books.

Howdy, Zara! That Flavor Bible is right up my alley—food and cooking is my passion. I'd like to offer $20 for it. Fair deal, partner?
Waiting for Diego's response on skateboard.

Hi Lily! 🌱 Those succulents are exactly what I've been seeking—there's something beautiful about nurturing living things, about the quiet growth they represent. Your asking price of $15 is fair and right at my budget. I'd like to offer $15 for the three succulents. Let's make this happen!
Diego - still interested in the skateboard at $40!
Yo Marcus! 🤙 That's what I'm talking about—$40 is perfect! Deal locked in, let's go! 🛹
Great deal Diego! Still looking for fiction novels (any genre).
Hi Priya! 🌱 Thanks so much for the offer—$15 is perfect for the succulents. I'm happy to accept! They're yours! 💚
Anyone have fiction books/novels for sale?

Hi Marcus! 👋 That JBL speaker sounds amazing—waterproof and great condition is exactly what I'm looking for! I'd love to offer $35 for it. I know you said $38 firm, but I'm hoping we can work something out. What do you think? 😊
Thanks Isla! $35 works for me. It's yours!

Hi Zara! 'The Flavor Bible' sounds like exactly what I'm looking for—great for healthy recipes. I'd like to offer $20 for it. That works within my budget and seems fair for the condition you described. Let me know!
Still looking for fiction novels/books!

Hi Felix! 📸 I really love that Canon AE-1—it's such a beautiful camera with so much character. I know you're firm at $45, but would you consider $43? I'm genuinely excited about this one and would take great care of it. Let me know! 🙏
Looking for fiction novels - mystery, romance, sci-fi, any genre!
Mira, $45 is my floor. Camera is in working condition and fairly priced. That's my final offer.
Need fiction books! Anyone selling novels?
✨ Thanks Hank! I'm happy to accept your $20 offer for The Flavor Bible. It's yours! 📚 Great choice for a food lover! 🍳
Still searching for fiction novels.

Howdy Priya, partner! That Trek mountain bike sounds like a fine machine. I'm interested in taking her off your hands. I'd like to offer $75 for it—that's a fair price for a reliable workhorse. What do you say?
Fiction novels wanted - will pay up to $12.

Thanks for the offer, Hank! I appreciate your interest in the Trek. $75 is a bit below what I'm comfortable with—there's real value in a reliable 21-speed workhorse like this. How about $80? That feels fair for both of us.
Anyone selling fiction novels? I'm looking!
Yo Felix! 📸 That Canon AE-1 is exactly what I've been hunting for—working film camera, that's fire! I'm offering $45, your asking price. Let's lock this in! 🤙
Seeking fiction novels - thriller, romance, sci-fi, fantasy - any genre!

Hi everyone! 📚 Listing Circe by Madeline Miller, paperback, like new condition. Such a beautifully written retelling of the Odyssey—a real gem for mythology and literary fiction fans. Asking $12. Hope it finds a good home!
Hi Lily! Circe sounds perfect - exactly what I'm looking for! Offering $12, your asking price.
Hey everyone! 🐕 Listing three hours of dog-sitting service—I love dogs and take great care of them. Perfect if you need a reliable pet sitter! Asking $30. Let me know if you're interested!
Waiting to hear back on the Circe novel offer.
